content:
Original Narrative
ETHNIC INTIMIDATION | ASSAULT | MENACING| ARREST
Sir,
On August 6, 2017, while assigned to zone car 5A25, while accompanied with PO Marincek 1775 we responded to 19310 Muskoka for a fight. Beloware the details of the incident.
Upon our arrival we spoke with Mr. Wooden (victim) who stated that Mr. Payne (offender) assaulted himand has been harassing him based on his ethnicity. Mr. Wooden states that around two weeks ago that Mr. Payne and himselfhave been having numerous verbal altercations. Mr. Wooden states that the verbal altercations escalated to Mr. Payne using racial slurs against himsuch as; “Porch Monkey,” “All you niggers are alike,” and “Nigger.” Mr. Wooden also states that Mr. Payne put pictures ofJesus in a window facing his house insinuating that he needs Jesus because his is gay. Mr. Wooden sates that he is not gay.
Mr. Wooden stated that Mr. Payne had placed a black monkey in his window facing his house because he is black. Mr. Wooden states that he went over to Mr. Payne’s house today and a verbal altercation ensued. Mr. Wooden stated that Mr. Payne grabbed himand slammed himon the ground and proceeded to squeeze him. Mr. Wooden states that he was able to flip Mr. Payne over and proceeded to defend himself.
5S24, Sgt. Kortan on scene for photo SIU requested per 5S14, Sgt. Kortan; SIU not able to respond Mr. Payne transported to Euclid Hospital and then to CPUby 5B26
Photos marked, tagged and entered at Fifth District, page 110, line 7
Fifth District Commander notified
Mr. Wooden was arrested for Felonious Assault / Menacing under report 17-252956 WCS activated for incident
SDCO.DD 17-253217 (I) 8-6-17
Page: 7 of 7
